examples: We wanted to reduce the cost of heating and air-conditioning.
It was 90 degrees and the air conditioning barely cooled the room.
You can't open the window because it screws up the air conditioning.
They are air-conditioning for the soul, wines of insouciant, shed-the-sweater sensuality, the sports drink of Mediterranean seductions.
Asked what she dislikes about her new home, she mentions that the air-conditioning is too cold.
